# Adobe DNG SDK Vendor Setup

Adobe DNG SDK source code is not committed in this repository.

Download the SDK from Adobe official pages:

- https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/dng-sdk.html
- https://helpx.adobe.com/camera-raw/digital-negative.html

Extract the downloaded SDK to:

`packages/adobe-dng-wasm/vendor/dng_sdk_1_7_1`

Expected source path after extraction:

`packages/adobe-dng-wasm/vendor/dng_sdk_1_7_1/dng_sdk/source`
